column1: # This file is the system of record for "what is current." Not this conversation's
# memory, not the last thing said in chat — this file. The Governance Agent updates
# it every time a new version of any tracked document is produced; the placement
# script (place_governance_doc.sh) verifies against it before anything gets copied
# anywhere. If this file and a chat message disagree, this file wins — but only
# once you've confirmed IT is current (see AGENT_REFERENCE.md Conflict Resolution).
#   project_knowledge — Claude.ai project file management (not scriptable; manual replace)
# Lines starting with # are comments. Do not hand-edit the data lines below without
# also updating the checksum — if you change a file's content, you must regenerate
# its hash (shasum -a 256 <file>) or the verify script will (correctly) refuse it.
